fields.label: Sender Phone Number (or ID)
fields.description: The ID of the business account's phone number from which the message will be sent from

fields.label: Recipient's Phone Number
fields.description: Phone number of the recipient of the message

fields.label: MessageType
fields.description: The type of the message

fields.label: Name
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: data, data.formatted_name, data.first_name, data.last_name, data.middle_name, data.suffix, data.prefix)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: addresses, birthday, emails, organization, phones, urls)

fields.label: Text Body
fields.description: The body of the message (max 4096 characters)

fields.label: Take Audio From
fields.description: Use a link, an ID, or n8n to upload an audio file

fields.label: Link
fields.description: Link of the media to be sent

fields.label: ID
fields.description: ID of the media to be sent

fields.label: Input Data Field Name
fields.description: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be uploaded

fields.label: Filename
fields.description: The name of the file (required when using a file ID)

endpoints.label: Send and Wait for Response Message

fields.label: Sender Phone Number (or ID)
fields.description: The ID of the business account's phone number from which the message will be sent from

fields.label: Recipient's Phone Number
fields.description: Phone number of the recipient of the message

endpoints.description: [unverified path] Send message and wait for response

fields.label: Sender Phone Number (or ID)
fields.description: The ID of the business account's phone number from which the message will be sent from

fields.label: Recipient's Phone Number
fields.description: Phone number of the recipient of the message

fields.label: Template
fields.description: Name of the template

fields.label: Components
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: component, component.type, component.bodyParameters, component.sub_type, component.index, component.buttonParameters, component.headerParameters)

fields.label: Sender Phone Number (or ID)
fields.description: The ID of the business account's phone number to store the media

fields.label: Property Name
fields.description: Name of the binary property which contains the data for the file to be uploaded

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: mediaFileName)

fields.label: Media ID
fields.description: The ID of the media

fields.label: Media ID
fields.description: The ID of the media
